data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. SEARCH HISTORY jumped from a low draw and boxed on well to finish second last time, beaten one length (16.91) behind Happy Chick at this track. Capable of going well again. 2. NESHIA made light work of the tricky draw with a fast early sectional but gathered in and had to settle for the minors, finishing second (16.98) at this track over 300m. Boasts two wins from two starts out of this box. Hard to beat again. 1. YEAH YOU has shown good improvement at his last two starts, finishing in the money last time when 2nd at Sale over 435m. The form from his last run is stacking up nicely. Will give a great sight again. 7. SIDEWINDER gets a chance to improve on an unplaced run at her latest outing at this circuit.","runners":[4,2,1,7],"exclusive":false}
